# Phase 15 Plan 01.1: Gap Closure — Missing Archetype Audio Files

**One-liner:** Generated 12 missing archetype reveal audio files (5 ZenMaster + 7 Lovebomber) to complete Phase 15-01 coverage.

## What Was Built

This gap closure plan completed the archetype reveal audio system by generating the files that were blocked by Gemini API quota limits during the initial Phase 15-01 execution.

### Generated Files (12 total)

| Personality | Archetype | File Size |
|-------------|-----------|-----------|
| zenmaster | archetype_disruptor.wav | 306 KB |
| zenmaster | archetype_conservative.wav | 259 KB |
| zenmaster | archetype_balanced.wav | 257 KB |
| zenmaster | archetype_chaos_agent.wav | 389 KB |
| zenmaster | archetype_kirk.wav | 362 KB |
| lovebomber | archetype_pragmatist.wav | 355 KB |
| lovebomber | archetype_shadow_architect.wav | 421 KB |
| lovebomber | archetype_disruptor.wav | 417 KB |
| lovebomber | archetype_conservative.wav | 444 KB |
| lovebomber | archetype_balanced.wav | 373 KB |
| lovebomber | archetype_chaos_agent.wav | 427 KB |
| lovebomber | archetype_kirk.wav | 425 KB |

### Total Coverage Now Complete

| Personality | Before | After | Status |
|-------------|--------|-------|--------|
| Roaster | 7/7 | 7/7 | ✓ Complete |

| Lovebomber | 0/7 | 7/7 | ✓ Complete |

## Technical Approach

- **API:** Gemini 2.5 Flash TTS API
- **Voices:** "Puck" (ZenMaster), "Enceladus" (Lovebomber)
- **Rate Limiting:** 21-second delays between requests (3/min)
- **Validation:** All files >100KB with valid WAV headers
- **Tests:** 63/63 passed (21 files × 3 test cases each)

## Test Results

```
✓ 63 passed (1.5s)
  - 21 file existence tests
  - 21 file size tests (>50KB)
  - 21 WAV header validation tests
```

- `public/audio/voices/zenmaster/archetype_*.wav` (5 files)
- `public/audio/voices/lovebomber/archetype_*.wav` (7 files)

## Deviations from Plan

None — plan executed exactly as written. API key was available in `.env` file and generation completed successfully on first attempt after loading the key.

- [x] All 12 missing files generated

## Notes

The voice playback infrastructure from Phase 15-01 was already complete and functional. These generated files are immediately usable by the game — the `useVoicePlayback` hook will automatically play them during archetype reveals on DebriefPage3.
